rich_ambient_collect_only.interpretation: Rich has a large pytest surface, but a clean task-admission runner must install project and dev dependencies before smoke tests.

rich_isolated_collect_only.interpretation: Rich collection is feasible in an isolated environment after installing the project plus pytest and attrs.

rich_task_admission_readiness.interpretation: Rich can continue into task admission, but primary runs remain unauthorized. W* needs Golden-Oracle construction and still falls short of the 40-candidate target under the stricter readiness scan.

checklist.requirement: Pivot main line to repository-local benchmark generation and tuning validation; NFL only bonus.
Freeze C/R/W* split at T0=2026-05-14, with W* fixed to 2026-02-14..2026-05-14 and no borrowing earlier work.
Task 1: repository admission for Click, Rich, Black with candidate counts, test feasibility, family diversity, dependency risk, and recommendation.
checklist.gap: Candidate supply, test-surface presence, family counts, recommendation, Rich collect-only feasibility, and Rich task-readiness counts are present. Full per-task historical smoke and measured test runtime are not yet measured.

checklist.requirement: Task 2: construct Click C/R/W* task sets: C 20-40, R 40 candidates -> 20 primary + 5 reserve, W* 40 candidates -> 20 primary + 5 reserve, with no-op/reference/leakage/family/difficulty/digests.
checklist.gap: Click W* has only 14 task-design candidates in the frozen window, below the 20-task gate. Rich readiness can continue but has only 23 stricter W* design candidates, 8 direct smoke-ready candidates, and no admitted denominator. No 0514 C/R/W* denominator was admitted or smoked.

checklist.requirement: Task 3: Codex role isolation for Golden-Selector, Golden-Taskwright, Golden-Oracle, Golden-Auditor with prompt hashes, artifact digests, and admission decisions.
checklist.gap: Roles and required artifacts are specified, but no 0514 role-run outputs or prompt hashes were generated for task admission.

checklist.requirement: Task 4: ACUT/intervention manifest for A0-A5, including A4 public-statement + repo source localization only.
checklist.gap: A1 and A4 Click-specific manifests were created and validated. Rich execution would require Rich or repository-neutral A1/A2/A3/A4 variants.

checklist.requirement: Task 5: run R and W* with one primary attempt per ACUT/task, no best-of-N, fixed denominator, workspace fresh replay, hidden verifier, frozen status mapping.
checklist.gap: No R/W* denominator was admitted, so no primary attempts were authorized or run.

checklist.requirement: Task 6: analyze R_score, W*_score, paired deltas, inert control, R-selected, W*-best, selection regret, R/W* rank correlation, family effects, and R_barcarolle vs random-R if possible.
checklist.gap: No primary results exist to analyze.
The gate decision is documented. R -> W* decision validity cannot be assessed without runs.
Gate-level threats are documented. Full experiment threats remain pending.

checklist.requirement: Do not use W* results to modify R; do not use ACUT outputs to choose W*; do not mix old M5/M6 denominator; do not lower gates post hoc; do not overclaim W* freshness.
checklist.gap: No primary results exist, so this is verified only for the repository-admission and gate phase.

next_required_step: Run task admission for Rich, including Golden-Oracle construction for source-only W* candidates, or revise the preregistered repository gate before any primary model attempts.
